goal: Wire bridge module into /team (implement action), /implement (team mode), and /status (progress display)

tasks.name: Add implement action to /team command
tasks.action: Add /team implement <feature> <plan> action that reads NN-PLAN.json via bridge module, creates team, creates TaskCreate entries with blockedBy from dependencies, spawns implementer teammates, activates delegate mode.

tasks.name: Add team mode to /implement command
tasks.action: Add Step 1c: Team Mode detection. If --team flag or multi-task plan with Agent Teams available, suggest /team implement delegation. Preserve existing serial flow when team mode is not active.

tasks.name: Add team-implement display to /status
tasks.action: Extend Step 3b to show team implementation progress: completed/in-progress/remaining task counts for active epic implementations.

commitMessage: feat(team-implement-integration): wire bridge into team/implement/status commands
